hooks.command: cd /Users/nick/IdeaProjects/MesoQL && find obsidian -name '*.md' | sort | while read f; do echo "### $f ###"; cat "$f"; echo; done | jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": .}}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Reminder: update the Obsidian knowledge base in obsidian/ to reflect any changes made this session."}'
hooks.statusMessage: Reminding Claude to update Obsidian vault...
